name: Antipasto Hero
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bread loaf horizontally in half.
2. Mix 1/4 cup olive oil, 2 tbsp red wine vinegar, 1 tsp sugar, 1/2 tsp crushed oregano, and 1/4 tsp red pepper flakes in a bowl until well combined.
3. Drizzle the mixture evenly over the cut sides and top halves of the bread.
4. Arrange leaf lettuce on the bottom half of the bread.
5. Layer the provolone cheese slices, ham, salami, tomatoes, and peppers on top of the lettuce.
6. Cover with the top half of the bread.
7. Secure the sandwich with toothpicks or small skewers.
8. Wrap securely in plastic wrap or aluminum foil and refrigerate for up to 6 hours.
9. When ready to serve, cut into 6 equal pieces and enjoy.
